rows.skill: translate-with-ollama/scripts/translate_json_batch.py":{"type":"add","content":"#!/usr/bin/env python3/n/"/"/"Translate a JSON array through the local Ollama HTTP API, with resume support./"/"/"/n/nfrom __future__ import annotations/n/nimport argparse/nimport json/nimport sys/nimport urllib.request/nfrom pathlib import Path/n/n/ndef parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:/n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()/n    parser.add_argument(/"input/", type=Path)/n    parser.add_argument(/"output/", type=Path)/n    parser.add_argument(/"--model/", default=/"gemma4:12b-mlx/")/n    parser.add_argument(/"--id-field/", default=/"id/")/n    parser.add_argument(/"--name-field/", default=/"name/")/n    parser.add_argument(/"--source-field/", default=/"description/")/n    parser.add_argument(/"--target-field/", default=/"description_en/")/n    parser.add_argument(/"--url/", default=/"http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate/")/n    parser.add_argument(/"--timeout/", type=int, default=900)/n    return parser.parse_args()/n/n/ndef load_array(path: Path) -> list[dict]:/n    data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding=/"utf-8/"))/n    if not isinstance(data, list) or not all(isinstance(item, dict) for item in data):/n        raise ValueError(f/"{path} must contain a JSON array of objects/")/n    return data/n/n/ndef save(path: Path, rows: list[dict]) -> None:/n    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)/n    temporary = path.with_suffix(path.suffix + /".tmp/")/n    temporary.write_text(/n        json.dumps(rows, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + /"//n/", encoding=/"utf-8/"/n    )/n    temporary.replace(path)/n/n/ndef translate(url: str, model: str, text: str, timeout: int) -> str:/n    prompt = (/n        /"Translate this text into natural English. Preserve every paragraph, Markdown /"/n        /"heading, emoji, joke, name, and fact. Do not summarize. Output only the /"/n        /"translation, with no label or commentary.//n//n/" + text/n    )/n    payload = json.dumps(/n        {/n            /"model/": model,/n            /"prompt/": prompt,/n            /"stream/": False,/n            /"options/": {/"temperature/": 0.15, /"num_predict/": 6000},/n        }/n    ).encode()/n    request = urllib.request.Request(/n        url, data=payload, headers={/"Content-Type/": /"application/json/"}/n    )/n    with urllib.request.urlopen(request, timeout=timeout) as response:/n        result = json.load(response)/n    translated = str(result.get(/"response/", /"/")).strip()/n    for prefix in (/"Translation:/", /"English translation:/"):/n        if translated.lower().startswith(prefix.lower()):/n            translated = translated[len(prefix) :].lstrip()/n    return translated/n/n/ndef main() -> int:/n    args = parse_args()/n    sources = load_array(args.input)/n    output = load_array(args.output) if args.output.exists() else []/n    completed = {str(row.get(args.id_field, /"/")) for row in output}/n/n    source_ids = [str(row.get(args.id_field, /"/")) for row in sources]/n    if /"/" in source_ids or len(source_ids) != len(set(source_ids)):/n        raise ValueError(/"Source IDs must be present and unique/")/n/n    for row in sources:/n        item_id = str(row[args.id_field])/n        source = str(row.get(args.source_field, /"/")).strip()/n        if not source:/n            print(f/"skip empty: {item_id}/", file=sys.stderr)/n            continue/n        if item_id in completed:/n            print(f/"resume skip: {item_id}/", file=sys.stderr)/n            continue/n/n        translated = translate(args.url, args.model, source, args.timeout)/n        if not translated:/n            raise RuntimeError(f/"Empty translation for {item_id}/")/n        output.append(/n            {/n                args.id_field: item_id,/n                args.name_field: row.get(args.name_field, /"/"),/n                args.target_field: translated,/n            }/n        )/n        completed.add(item_id)/n        save(args.output, output)/n        print(f/"translated: {item_id}/", file=sys.stderr)/n/n    expected = {/n        str(row[args.id_field])/n        for row in sources/n        if str(row.get(args.source_field, /"/")).strip()/n    }/n    actual = {str(row.get(args.id_field, /"/")) for row in output}/n    if expected != actual or len(actual) != len(output):/n        raise RuntimeError(/n            f/"Validation failed: missing={sorted(expected-actual)}, /"/n            f/"extra={sorted(actual-expected)}, duplicates={len(output)-len(actual)}/"/n        )/n    print(f/"validated: {len(actual)} unique translations/")/n    return 0/n/n/nif __name__ == /"__main__/":/n    raise SystemExit(main())/n"},"/Users/art/.codex/skills/translate-with-ollama
